surface_styles.dashboard_cards: bg-white border border-[#E5E2DC] rounded-lg p-6 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#2A3B32]/30
surface_styles.navigation: bg-[#F9F8F6]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E2DC] sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-[#2A3B32] text-white hover:bg-[#3D5247] hover:text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2F0ED] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#E5E2DC] hover:text-[#1A1A1A] px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-[#E5E2DC] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:border-[#2A3B32] hover:bg-[#F9F8F6] hover:text-[#1A1A1A] px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

components.tables: w-full text-left text-sm text-[#5C5C5C] border-collapse. Headers should be uppercase labels tracking-[0.2em]. Rows separated by border-b border-[#E5E2DC].
components.forms: Use Shadcn inputs heavily customized to remove generic Vercel focus rings. Use focus:border-[#2A3B32] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2A3B32]. Avoid native datepickers.
components.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all functional icons. Stroke width 1.5. No emojis.
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Lines: #2A3B32. Bars: #4A6B53. Tooltips must be styled with the dashboard card surface styling.

animations.interactions: Micro-interactions on hover. Hover state color must be explicitly defined. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) on cards.
animations.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease

media.instructions: MUST use the following exact image URLs for the specified components. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com. Use standard lucide-react icons for abstract representations if images are not suitable.

urls.description: Background image for the authentication and landing pages. Use with max black/30 overlay.
Split screen image for login/register page
Fallback photo logo for PayPal integration card in the settings/marketplace view.
Fallback photo logo for Stripe/Skrill integration card in the settings/marketplace view.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., 'submit-payment-btn', 'revenue-kpi-card', 'nav-ledger-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'lucide-react' is used for UI icons. Do not use emojis.
Load Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in the frontend app entry point.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the financial dashboard, strictly using col-span/row-span properties to maximize screen utilization. Maintain gap-6 between cards.
For the Landing page and Auth pages, use the provided Unsplash URLs. Apply a black/30 overlay maximum on the hero image to ensure it is visible while keeping text readable.
Apply 'data-testid' attributes to every button, input, navigation link, and KPI card.
Adhere strictly to the color palette. Do not use default Tailwind blues or indigos. The app must feel earthy, solid, and mature.
